strengths: Currently Staff Engineer at re:cinq in exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, AI-agent infrastructure)
15+ years full-stack development across multiple languages, platforms, and domains with consistent seniority progression
MIT CS degree with extensive open-source contributions (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and mentoring track record
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being primary stack requirement
React experience concentrated in 2021-2025 period; recent work emphasizes backend and tooling over frontend
Vitest and Jest not explicitly named despite clear TDD and testing advocacy in workshops and methodology
response.justification: Strong candidate with 15+ years of relevant experience and direct alignment to current role requirements at re:cinq. MIT CS graduate demonstrates solid engineering foundation with proven full-stack capability, multiple language proficiency, and architecture leadership. Primary concerns are naming gaps (Nest.js, Vitest) rather than capability gaps; underlying Node.js and testing expertise are clearly established. Appears slightly overqualified in terms of seniority level but well-suited for the role.
